title: Jamnagar Is India's Energy Crown Jewel — Which Also Makes It Biggest Strategic Liability
description: Biggest Strategic Liability?Jamnagar emerged as India's refinery hub in the mid-1990s for reasons that were, at the time, entirely rational.In May 2025, during the hostilities that followed Operation Sindoor, Pakistan tried to strike targets across Jammu and Kashmir and Punjab. But at least one target was further south — in Bhuj, Gujarat. Bhuj is roughly 150 km from Jamnagar.Jamnagar is not a military installation. It is the site of the world's largest refining complex, with a capacity of 1.4 mi
